evals.prompt: Write the Kiro design.md for the avatar upload feature based on its requirements.
evals.expected_output: A design with overview, architecture, components/interfaces, data models, error handling, and testing strategy, all traced to requirement numbers.
expectations: Includes all six sections (Overview through Testing Strategy)
References the requirement numbers each design element satisfies
Defines concrete data models and error handling

evals.prompt: This design doc has no data models and doesn't reference any requirements. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Adds data models, testing strategy, and traceability to requirement numbers.
expectations: Adds traceability references to requirement numbers
Adds an Error Handling and Testing Strategy section

evals.prompt: Where does design.md sit in the Kiro flow and what must it connect to?
evals.expected_output: Explains design.md is second, traces back to requirements.md and feeds tasks.md.
expectations: States design.md is the second of three Kiro documents
Explains it traces to requirements.md and feeds tasks.md
Notes every section should map to a requirement
